subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from this Most Great Prison, that thou mayest render thanks unto thy Lord, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed. Say: O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی ان المظلوم یذکرک من هذا السجن الاعظم لتشکر ربک العلیم الخبیر قل یا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement
